elements.title: lang::report_page_013_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT CASE
         WHEN kbi_gi.grademax > 0 THEN (kbi_cri.gradepass / kbi_gi.grademax) * 100
         ELSE kbi_cri.gradepass END            AS gradepass,
       kbi_cri.gradepass                       AS gradepass_raw,
       kbi_u.email,
       kbi_ue.userid,
       kbi_ue.started,
       kbi_c.id                                AS cid,
       kbi_c.fullname,
       kbi_ue.enrolment,
       kbi_c.startdate,
       kbi_lit.lastaccess,
       git.average,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 2) AS grade,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 2) AS grade_raw,
       ROUND((CASE
                WHEN (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin) > 0
                        THEN ((kbi_g.finalgrade - kbi_g.rawgrademin) / (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin)) * 100
                ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 2) AS grade_percent,
       kbi_cmc.completed,
       kbi_u.firstname,
       kbi_u.lastname,
       kbi_lit.timespend,
       kbi_lit.visits,
       kbi_c.enablecompletion,
       kbi_cc.timecompleted                    AS complete
FROM (SELECT DISTINCT kbi_e.courseid,
                      kbi_ue.userid,
                      (CASE
                         WHEN kbi_ue.timestart > 0
                                 THEN kbi_ue.timestart
                         ELSE kbi_ue.timecreated
                          END) AS started,
                      (CASE
                         WHEN kbi_e.name IS NULL
                                 THEN kbi_e.enrol
                         ELSE CONCAT(kbi_e.enrol, '(', kbi_e.name, ')')
                          END) AS enrolment
      FROM mdl_enrol kbi_e
             JOIN mdl_user_enrolments kbi_ue ON kbi_ue.enrolid = kbi_e.id
             JOIN mdl_context kbi_ctx ON kbi_ctx.contextlevel = 50 AND kbi_ctx.instanceid = kbi_e.courseid
             JOIN mdl_role_assignments kbi_ra
               ON kbi_ra.contextid = kbi_ctx.id AND kbi_ra.userid = kbi_ue.userid AND kbi_ra.roleid = 5
      WHERE kbi_ue.userid > 0
        AND kbi_e.status = 0
        AND kbi_ue.status = 0
        AND kbi_e.courseid = :courseid) ue
       JOIN mdl_user kbi_u ON kbi_u.id = kbi_ue.userid
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_ue.courseid
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completions kbi_cc ON kbi_cc.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cc.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN mdl_course_completion_criteria kbi_cri ON kbi_cri.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cri.criteriatype = 6
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_items kbi_gi ON kbi_gi.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
       LEFT JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_lit.userid,
                         kbi_lit.courseid,
                         SUM(kbi_lit.timespend)  as timespend,
                         SUM(kbi_lit.visits)     as visits,
                         MAX(kbi_lit.lastaccess) as lastaccess
                  FROM mdl_local_kopere_bi_tracking kbi_lit
                  WHERE kbi_lit.courseid > 0
                    AND kbi_lit.courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_lit.courseid, kbi_lit.userid) lit ON kbi_lit.courseid = kbi_c.id AND kbi_lit.userid = kbi_u.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_gi.courseid,
                         ROUND(AVG(CASE
                                     WHEN (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin) > 0
                                             THEN ((kbi_g.finalgrade - kbi_g.rawgrademin) / (kbi_g.rawgrademax - kbi_g.rawgrademin)) * 100
                                     ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 2) AS average
                  FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi, mdl_grade_grades kbi_g
                  WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'course'
                    AND kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id
                    AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
                    AND kbi_gi.courseid = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_gi.courseid) git ON git.courseid = kbi_c.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_cmc.userid, kbi_cm.course, COUNT(kbi_cmc.id) as completed
                  FROM mdl_course_modules_completion kbi_cmc, mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
                  WHERE kbi_cm.visible = 1
                    AND kbi_cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
                    AND kbi_cmc.completionstate IN (1, 2)
                    AND kbi_cm.course = :courseid
                  GROUP BY kbi_cm.course, kbi_cmc.userid) cmc ON kbi_cmc.course = kbi_c.id AND kbi_cmc.userid = kbi_u.id
WHERE kbi_u.id > 0
  AND kbi_u.deleted = 0
  AND kbi_u.suspended = 0
  AND kbi_u.username != 'guest'
  AND kbi_c.visible = 1
